recommendations.title: Miss
recommendations.overview: A young man seeking his sexual identity decides to take part in the Miss France beauty pageant.

recommendations.title: Dumplin'
recommendations.overview: To prove a point about measuring up and fitting in, Texas teen Willowdean “Dumplin’” Dickson enters a local pageant run by her ex-beauty queen mom.

recommendations.title: O Brother, Where Art Thou?
recommendations.overview: In the deep south during the 1930s, three escaped convicts search for hidden treasure while a relentless lawman pursues them.

recommendations.title: Little Miss Sunshine
recommendations.overview: A family loaded with quirky, colorful characters piles into an old van and road trips to California for little Olive to compete in a beauty pageant.

recommendations.title: The Desperate Hours
recommendations.overview: Escaped convicts terrorize a suburban family they're holding hostage.

recommendations.title: Kopps
recommendations.overview: A small Swedish village, Högboträsk, is so peaceful that crime is nonexistent. The police spend their shifts drinking coffee, eating hot dogs and chasing down runaway cows. This is all well and good for the village's own police, but the police manage

recommendations.title: Miss Congeniality
recommendations.overview: When the local FBI office receives a letter from a terrorist known only as 'The Citizen', it's quickly determined that he's planning his next act at the Miss America beauty pageant. Because tough-as-nails Gracie Hart is the only female Agent at the o

recommendations.title: Swelter
recommendations.overview: Ten years after their casino heist, four escaped convicts trace their former partner to a desert town, where he is now a lawman with no memory of his criminal past.

recommendations.title: The Pilgrim
recommendations.overview: The Tramp is an escaped convict who is mistaken as a pastor in a small town church.

recommendations.title: Hurricane Bianca
recommendations.overview: A teacher from New York moves to a small town in Texas, gets fired for being gay, and returns disguised in drag to get revenge on the people who were nasty to him.
